text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I escort Mejiro Bright to the infirmary after she
suffers an injury during training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, but... while I appreciate your concern,
as you can see, I'm still fit to run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'll not make any progress at all standing still.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get back to training, shall we?
choice_data_list: Rest is the real shortcut to success.
Rest is the real shortcut to success.
...Can you promise me you won't overdo it?
...Can you promise me you won't overdo it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get back to training, shall we?
choice_data_list: Rest is the real shortcut to success.
Rest is the real shortcut to success.
...Can you promise me you won't overdo it?
...Can you promise me you won't overdo it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I'd never thought of it that way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Very well. I shall take your word for it, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Please tailor tomorrow's training session so as to
make up for lost time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear... It hurts a little when I stretch out like
so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Sigh... ...As much as it pains me to do this, I shall honor my promise and rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's take things nice and slowly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Overexerting myself in an effort to recover
sooner would do me more harm than good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's light stretching pays off, and she
soon makes up for the lost time.
